description: Circle morphs into an irregular polygon representing transformation from safe to threat state

fields.COMPARE_LABEL_1: Label for initial shape state, e.g. 'NORMAL'
fields.COMPARE_VALUE_1: Value shown during initial state, e.g. 'SECURE'
fields.COMPARE_LABEL_2: Label for transformed state, e.g. 'THREAT DETECTED'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Context or source line at bottom
